step2_rag_chunks: There are two kinds of triggers â€” situational and emotional. Situational triggers are external: after meals, with tea, during a work break. Taking a short walk or doing light physical activity can help reduce stress and distract from cravings.
Deep breathing exercises can calm the body and reduce the urge to smoke.
